75944.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 14
75944.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-14-oleh-bezuhlyi-4exjf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BKR2zqEmTTEaesa3Hv7eudQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3BdYJMiILaJck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrkullev~l-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrkullev-l
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Washington is where the action is. With the CLARITY Act clock ticking and Circle winning a federal trust charter, the plumbing of regulated crypto is being poured — even as prices stay pinned by war headlines. 🏛️ CLARITY Act Enters Its Make-or-Break Senate Week The Senate returned with roughly four weeks before the August recess to move the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act, the market-structure bill that would finally split SEC and CFTC jurisdiction over digital assets. Senator Lummis is pushing for floor time, President Trump has publicly urged passage, and a reduced GOP majority makes the math tight. Odds are being handicapped near a coin flip. Read full story 🏦 Circle Wins OCC Approval for a National Trust Bank Circle secured the OCC's nod to operate a national trust bank, placing USDC reserves and custody under direct federal oversight. It is the clearest sign yet that stablecoin issuers are being absorbed into the regulated banking perimeter rather than kept outside it — and a template rivals will now have to match. More details ⚖️ SEC Signals a Formal "Regulation Crypto" Rulebook A rulemaking package framed as "Regulation Crypto" suggests Chair Paul Atkins' SEC is moving from case-by-case enforcement toward a written digital-asset framework. For firms that spent years guessing at the rules, a codified rulebook would be the most consequential shift in agency posture since the ETF approvals. Read more 🏢 Wall Street Transfer Agents Warn SEC Over Third-Party Tokens The Securities Transfer Association lobbied the SEC to argue that third-party tokenized versions of equities threaten market integrity, and that only company-authorized tokenization should get preferential treatment under future rules. It is the incumbent record-keepers drawing a line against the tokenized-stock boom. See details 🥇 Tether Puts Its $20B Gold Hoard to Work in Lending Tether plans to deploy a gold stockpile rivaling a top-20 sovereign reserve into lending. The issuer already carries roughly $141 billion of direct and indirect Treasury exposure and booked over $1 billion in Q1 profit — turning the world's largest stablecoin operator into something that increasingly resembles a shadow central bank. Read full story 💵 Stablecoins Move Record Volume as the Float Shrinks Adjusted stablecoin transaction volume hit a record $1.79 tri

75942.subject: Robinhood Chain launched and the numbers are astounding
75942.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c2549d42-c592-4e6b-82e8-409bebea29d3/Top_banner.jpg?t=1783431744) [Brought to you by Boardwalk]
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/research/report/boardwalk-closing-the-gap-between-token-launches-token-economies)
Caption: 

Welcome to the DefiLlama Newsletter. Each week we bring you the most valuable onchain insights from the the deepest DeFi dataset in the world.



Subscribe (https://newsletter.defillama.com)



## Robinhood Chain takes off

Robinhood Chain’s mainnet launch has been a blockbuster. Here’s the snapshot:

* $160m TVL

* $325m in stablecoins

* $12m in RWAs

* $10m → $800m daily DEX volume ($4.6b cumulative)

* Over [500k addresses hold ETH](https://defillama.com/pro/eth-distribution-on-robinhood-s8l839) on Robinhood Chain

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/a5a5ab4a-6166-439c-8dec-ec20e044ff12/robinhood-chain_2026-07-14.png?t=1784036733)
Follow image link: (https://defillama.com/chain/robinhood-chain)
Caption: 

TVL on Robinhood Chain has grown by at least $10m most days, with a particularly strong inflow day today.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/f0e58e1f-c118-4a9a-95e5-0ddd87c9460f/robinhood-chain-daily-tvl-growth_2026-07-14.png?t=1784042407)
Caption: 

Morpho and Uniswap dominate TVL, combining for 96% of all locked value.

View Robinhood Chain Protocol Rankings (https://defillama.com/chain/robinhood-chain)

Chain activity pushed Robinhood up to the top 5 chains in 7d DEX volume, moving nearly 10% of all onchain DEX volume.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/7818b5e5-eb37-4b5d-80fd-bf1ef047a86e/7d-dex-volume-by-chain-robinhood-chain-vs-peers_2026-07-13.png?t=1783960489)
Caption: 

While the capital base is still small compared to competitors, Robinhood Chain is punching well above its weight in DEX activity and has the highest DEX volume-to-TVL ratio compared to competitors.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/4195d56a-3ee5-461c-b89c-f775f849a9b7/7-day-dex-volume-to-tvl-ratio-robinhood-chain-vs-top-chains_2026-07-13.png?t=1783960752)
Caption: 

## Uniswap earns massive fees after launch

Uniswap is currently facilitating over 99% of Robinhood Chain’s DEX volume. Nearly $4b in volume has exchanged hands through Uniswap just over the last seven days, and [total Uniswap DEX volume is up 71% WoW](https://defillama.com/protocol/dexs/uniswap).

Robinhood Chain’s $3b in activity is responsible for 25% of Uniswap’s 7d DEX volume and ranks 2nd only to Ethereum, which produced $4.7b.

H

75936.subject: 📈 Cool CPI sends crypto markets
75936.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $63,755 (2.3%) | **ETH** $1,862 (5.3%) | **SOL** $77 (1.3%)

* ==[$100M ](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2077019244974465498?s=20)====worth of crypto shorts get wiped out as ====[CPI](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2077008212994253025?s=20)==== posts largest monthly drop since 2020==

* Trump formally notifies Congress that the US is at [war with Iran](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2076777484775985242)==, unlocking 60 more days of military action without congressional approval==

* ==The US issues ==[$81B in refunds](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2076830790688641053)== after the Supreme Court rules Trump's tariffs illegal==

* ==Hyperliquid hits a ==[record 9.1% share](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2076776381535363444) of aggregate perp open interest versus centralized exchanges

* [IBM crashes 25%](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2077023778018935277?s=20) at open after lower than expected earnings

* ==Trump will ==[address the nation](https://x.com/tokens/status/2076816198143180911) Thursday at 9 p.m. Eastern regarding declassified 2020 [election fraud data](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2076755890695221526)

* Report claims that Meta used AI software to target workers with [medical issues ](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2077027718282019203?s=20)for layoffs

* Trump demands [20% cargo fee](https://x.com/DeItaone/status/2076798855408963654) on Strait of Hormuz shipments

* Deepseek prepares for [IPO](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2077033257778978965?s=20) as soon as this year

* Claynosaurz Season 1 is now [streaming on Amazon Prime](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2077029088284344500?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/cool-cpi-sends-crypto-markets

padding-right: 20px !important; } }       LuxAlgo   на которого вы подписаны, опубликовал(а) новый скрипт (indicator)   Order Flow 3D Delta Profile [LuxAlgo] The Order Flow 3D Delta Profile indicator provides a spatial visualization of volume delta distribution across a specified lookback period, using 3D extrusion to represent market depth and intensity⁠. 🔶 USAGE The indicator projects a 3D volume profile onto the chart, allowing traders to identify price levels with significant buying or selling pressure⁠. Unlike traditional 2D profiles, this tool uses depth and perspective to highlight the relationship between price, volume, and time&#828

75932.subject: Everything Down, Except Oil and Solana
75932.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

Hi all, happy Tuesday! Today, we break down the broader risk-off move in global markets, why select Solana ecosystem tokens are outperforming, and Jito’s launch of JTX, its new institutional-grade trading interface.

Let’s get into it.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

BTC closed Monday down 2.5%, underperforming amid a broader risk-off move that also pushed equities and gold lower. Oil, meanwhile, rallied as much as 8% as clashes around the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns over global energy supplies.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/5f3c62b6-a067-49e3-9b27-443541608c29/image.png?t=1784032421)
Caption: 

Macro conditions could still create further headwinds. Fed Governor Christopher Waller said near-term rate hikes could return to the table if inflation comes in hot. However, this morning’s cooler-than-expected CPI release eased those concerns, with both headline and core inflation declining in June. CME FedWatch now assigns roughly a 17% probability to a hike at the next meeting, down from nearly 42% yesterday.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/2c9438c4-7566-4c19-bb1c-9560a55efc68/image.png?t=1784035316)
Caption: 

Despite the market uncertainty, the Solana Ecosystem index showed notable relative strength, led by META (+10%), JTO (+5.5%), and CLOUD (+3.4%).

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dfc518d0-046b-4a37-92cb-499dc04d696c/image.png?t=1784032421)
Caption: 

META’s rally follows continued demand for MetaDAO launches. Two weeks after Laso Finance attracted more than $25 million in commitments before capping its sale at $1 million, Credible Finance drew $6 million within two minutes of opening yesterday and had reached $21M as of this morning. MetaDAO remains crypto’s most credible attempt at realizing the Internet Capital Markets vision through permissionless capital formation and decision markets.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/409219db-df77-4cf6-83a7-25d5d1fbc45f/image.png?t=1784032421)
Caption: 

JTO also outperformed ahead of today’s JTX exchange launch, which Toma covers below. Separately, the Jito Foundation proposed JIP-38, which would formally establish Jito as a token-centric network wher
